test-method.name: verifyBlankOTP
test-method.description: Verify validation message for blank OTP

test-method.name: verifyUpperCaseEmail
test-method.description: Verify email field accepts uppercase email

test-method.name: verifyValidEmail
test-method.description: Verify email field accepts valid email

test-method.name: verifyExistingUser
test-method.description: Verify existing user is redirected to login page
